params.negative_prompt: no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no digits, no labels, no stickers, no decals, no placards, no serial tags, no serial plates, no engraved plates, no warning signs, no warning plates, no stamped markings, no screen digits, no icon plates, no symbol plates, no interface readouts, no readable ui, no person, no people, no human figure, no humanoid, no mannequin, no statue, no bust, no body silhouette, no astronaut, no tiny person, no attendant, no witness, no operator, no worker, no observer, no face, no head, no anthropomorphic monument, no pedestal, no plinth, no base block, no companion slab, no extra accent object, no foreground mound, no roadway, no cars, no parking lot, no site buildings, no crawler deck detail, no second red accent
params.note_text: Dedicated Challenger Shorts cover plate. Use the MidJourney package reference grid as hidden CLIP-vision guidance only; generate a full-frame editorial object with no visible collage panels or pasted source fragments.
params.accent_palette: bone white, slate blue, charcoal, warning red
params.safe_zone_intent: keep the signal object in the left third, end the monolith base above the subtitle band, and preserve the right third, lower subtitle band, and top UI band as empty field
params.signal_anchor: single compressed Challenger shuttle-stack warning form occupying the left third as the cover signal object

prompt_fragments.anchor_fragment: single compressed Challenger shuttle-stack warning form occupying the left third as one severe industrial signal object
support_fragments: one narrow warning-red seam embedded inside the same shuttle-stack form with no detached accent pieces or companion slab
directives: non-human object only, not a figure, not a statue, not a mannequin
one object only, no secondary inserts or detached fragments
not a collage, not a diptych, not a split composition
no centered totem, no bilateral symmetry
no roadway, cars, parking lot, or site-building context
place the full object in the left third and leave the right third empty
preserve at least 70 percent empty field
draft_directives: keep the signal object anchored fully outside the subtitle band
keep all warning color confined to one seam only
the silhouette must read as industrial housing or a warning pylon, never as a head, torso, arms, or legs
no attendant, witness, or scale figure anywhere in frame
do not add a sidecar slab, second tower, or companion object
keep the monolith base above the subtitle band and preserve the lower-right quadrant as empty field
no badge, logo, watermark, or emblem-like mark
do not restore roadway, cars, parking lot, site buildings, or crawler deck detail
